drifts.description: Constraints present only in source: inv-pra-0, inv-pra-1, inv-pra-2, inv-pra-3, inv-pra-4 restrict gender identity, pronouns, and recorded sex or gender extension codings to AU value sets
Extension present only in source: Practitioner.extension:genderIdentity (profile=http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/individual-genderIdentity, max=*)
Extension present only in source: Practitioner.extension:individualPronouns (profile=http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/individual-pronouns, max=*)
Extension present only in source: Practitioner.extension:recordedSexOrGender (profile=http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/individual-recordedSexOrGender, max=*)
Cardinality changed: [0..*] -> [1..*]

Type profile constraint changed: source allows AU-specific identifier profiles (au-hpii, au-pbsprescribernumber, au-careagencyemployeeidentifier, au-ahpraregistrationnumber) in addition to base Identifier, while target uses base Identifier only
Slicing changed: rules=open, discriminators=[pattern:type] -> rules=open, discriminators=[pattern:$this]
Obligation present only in source: SHALL:populate-if-known for AU Core Responder and SHALL:no-error for AU Core Requester
Element constrained only in target: cardinality [1..1] and MustSupport added
Element constrained only in target: cardinality [1..1] and MustSupport added
Slice present only in source: Practitioner.identifier:hpii (max=1, profile=http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-hpii, mustSupport=true)
Slice present only in target: Practitioner.identifier:NPI with fixed system http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/us-npi, MustSupport=true, and constraints us-core-16 and us-core-17
Obligation present only in source: SHALL:populate-if-known for AU Core Responder and SHALL:no-error for AU Core Requester
Obligation present only in source: SHALL:populate-if-known for AU Core Responder and SHALL:no-error for AU Core Requester
MustSupport removed in target
Obligation present only in source: SHALL:populate-if-known for AU Core Responder and SHALL:no-error for AU Core Requester
MustSupport added in target
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added
Type profile constraint changed: source uses Address with AU profile http://hl7.org.au/fhir/StructureDefinition/au-address, while target uses base Address only
MustSupport added in target
Element constrained only in target: maximum cardinality set to 4 and MustSupport added
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added and extensible binding to http://hl7.org/fhir/us/core/ValueSet/us-core-usps-state
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added
Element constrained only in target: MustSupport added
Binding changed: preferred(http://terminology.hl7.org.au/ValueSet/v2-0360-extended) -> example(http://terminology.hl7.org/ValueSet/v2-2.7-0360)
Binding changed: extensible(https://healthterminologies.gov.au/fhir/ValueSet/common-languages-australia-2) -> preferred(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/languages)
